name: DNS ServerLevelPluginDll Installation
description: Detects the installation of a plugin DLL for the DNS server by monitoring registry modifications and dnscmd.exe commands. This technique is used to execute arbitrary code within the context of the DNS service, potentially leading to privilege escalation and persistence.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious DNS ServerLevelPluginDll installation detected via registry modification or dnscmd.exe. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Registry Key** {registry_key}, **Registry Value** {registry_value}, **Command** {command}. Investigate this critical event immediately for signs of privilege escalation or persistence attempts within the DNS service.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Registry value set (13) or Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the event occurred.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that performed the action (e.g., dnscmd.exe).

parameters.name: registry_key
parameters.description: The registry key that was modified (if applicable).

parameters.name: registry_value
parameters.description: The value set in the registry key (if applicable).

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line used (if applicable, for process creation events).
